name: payment_flow
description: Sub-workflow handling payment processing — validates the payment method, charges the card, and records the transaction.

tasks.name: validate_payment
tasks.description: Validates the payment method — checks card expiry, billing address, and fraud score.

tasks.name: charge_card
tasks.description: Submits the charge to the payment gateway and waits for authorization.

tasks.name: record_transaction
tasks.description: Writes the authorized transaction to the payments ledger.
